title: Jar Opener (4PK) - Rubber Jar Gripper for Weak Hands - Bottle Opener for Arthritic Hands - Jar/Lid Opener Gripper Pad - Non Tear - Coaster - Trivet
description:
About this item
Textured and Durable Rubber Grips for Opening Jars - Made of premium high grade non-toxic silicone that will not rip and provides excellent leverage for opening stubborn jars.
Improve Performance of Weak Hands or Arthritic Hands - Turn senior hands weak from arthritis into strong grip for all of your silicone jar opener pad, bottle opener or lid opener needs.
Odor Free and Looks Great - Why waste money on inferior solutions that smell like old car tires or are made from perforated shelf liner, these kitchen grips are the key to open jars.
Enhance the Look of Your Kitchen - Multi-Purpose bottle opener or coaster in stylish modern color palettes, brighten counter or table with beautiful hues. Provides heat resistance and moisture barrier for kitchen counters and tables.
Finding the right Jar Opener from a reliable, trustworthy company is challenging. We offer a free replacement set should anything happen to your new Jar Gripper Pads. Just send us a message, and one of our friendly, USA-based customer support members will send you a replacement pack of Rubber Jar Openers at no cost, no questions asked.
reviews_5s:
I love the Human Intentions Jar Opener (4PK)! These rubber jar grippers make opening jars so much easier. It’s such a relief to be able to open stubborn lids without struggling or asking for help. The grippers are sturdy, easy to use, and work on a variety of jar sizes. Highly recommend for anyone who needs a little extra grip!These are great for opening jars, and bottles.
My hands are arthritic, so these pads make it possible for me to open anything. I highly recommend them!Arrive quickly ,great colors and “look” …n most of all works well!Great as I am a Senior,and have an auto immune disease in my hands. It is hard for me to grip and open jars and bottles. Highly reccomend.Great! Really grabs the jar lid well!Thicker than others I have purchased that ended up torn. Has great grip.Works well to.open jars. And bottles.Since my wife had a stroke, these are the best to help her open bottles.pleased with the products.Speedy deliveryThese jar openers are great. I had the old ones that would ravel and tair. These are much better.
reviews_1s:
These jar openers are worthless. They are too small to open lids on large jars and they are too slippery to get a grip with. I'm trying to make taco dip and I can't get the taco sauce jar open! Frustrating!Both sides are slippery! One side should have texture so that you can grip small bottles and large jars!
I can’t believe there are so many positive reviews for these.These don’t do what they say they do. Instead of gripping the lid and helping open it, they slide. The coating makes them slippery when what you want is something that doesn’t move.It’s not useful to open water bottles and others I need.They slipped off the jar for me . I Do have small hands which might have made a difference .This item is useless for me as it is too smooth- it slides off the top of jar. I need some opener with ribbing to help open jarsI’m sorry I don’t like them. They don’t have any kind of grippy on it.LOUSY CONSTRUCTIONThese don't really have good grip and have not been useful.I’m not a wimp…even if hand strength isn’t great … work out everyday. Zero grip to this. Flimsy and smooth. Returning.
